scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but marks `description` as required (✅) when the gold standard explicitly says it is optional. Also omits `upstream-source`, which the gold standard notes is very commonly included. The core structure and the container-resource linkage rule are accurately captured.
scores.hallucination_notes: Marks `description` as a required field when it is optional — minor factual inaccuracy. The claim that 'Charmcraft first checks Canonical's registry; if not found, it falls back to your local OCI registry' is an unverified behavioral claim not present in the gold standard and potentially inaccurate. No outright fabricated API names or parameters.
